pkgmetadata.longdescription: Howdy provides Windows Hello-style facial authentication for Linux via PAM, using an IR camera with dlib face recognition and OpenCV. This is the v3 (meson-built, compiled pam_howdy.so) snapshot, with the dlib recognition models bundled and single-threaded BLAS forced to avoid an OpenBLAS deadlock in dlib's ResNet on some CPUs.
